items.title: Traveler Checkout Clarity Release
items.description: Release focused on improving traveler booking confidence by clarifying payment timing, cancellation policies, and booking confirmation state across web and mobile checkout flows.

customerKPIs.expectedImpact: Increase conversion by reducing policy and payment ambiguity at the moment of booking.
Increase confidence by making policy and payment expectations more explicit before confirmation.

businessKPIs.expectedImpact: Increase monetizable room nights by converting more high-intent sessions cleanly.

productBricks.change: Clarify booking-state, payment timing, and cancellation handling in checkout.
Normalize payment-model explanation across properties and markets.
Improve booking confirmation and post-booking expectation setting.

deliveryChannels.change: Roll out clarified checkout copy and state transitions on web.
Release new booking-state and payment-model logic in backend services.

items.title: Partner Visibility Control Release
items.description: Release focused on giving accommodation partners clearer visibility into ranking, program participation, and promotion tradeoffs so they can improve profitable occupancy.

customerKPIs.expectedImpact: Increase occupancy quality by helping partners understand and act on visibility levers.
Increase commercial confidence through clearer program and promotion feedback.

businessKPIs.expectedImpact: Increase monetization by improving partner participation in profitable commercial levers.

productBricks.change: Improve promotion and program control surfaces.
Add clearer partner-facing visibility and outcome insights.
Simplify partner access to performance guidance and actions.

deliveryChannels.change: Launch improved partner commercial-control and insight experiences.
Release new reporting and recommendation services.

items.title: Host Activation Simplification Release
items.description: Release focused on reducing setup friction for smaller hosts through clearer defaults, policy explanations, and first-booking guidance.

customerKPIs.expectedImpact: Reduce time to first booking by simplifying onboarding and early merchandising choices.
Reduce setup time through clearer defaults and fewer confusing decisions.

businessKPIs.expectedImpact: Increase live, bookable homes supply entering the marketplace.

productBricks.change: Simplify host onboarding and property setup.
Improve booking-preference and calendar defaults for new hosts.
Clarify host trust, guest-quality, and protection cues.

deliveryChannels.change: Launch a simplified host setup flow in the partner extranet.
Release new onboarding defaults in supply services.
